{"step_by_step_thinking": "The relevant information can be found in Document [6], which states 'The peripheral compartment closest to the central zone is the cell-rich zone, a layer rich in fibroblasts and undifferentiated mesenchymal cell that functions in supporting the population of odontoblasts by proliferation and differentiation.' Additionally, Document [3] mentions 'Mesenchymal stem cells (MSCs) are multipotent and can be harvested from several tissues, eg, bone marrow, adipocytes, and amniotic tissue.'
